blocks.text: McIlroy finally wins the Masters — Old Trafford erupts tonight
Rory McIlroy ends years of Augusta heartbreak with the green jacket at -12, edging Scheffler by one. Hovland solid but distant at T19 (-4) — never in contention on Sunday.
🎾 Mon 09:00 — Casper Ruud opens Barcelona Open, clay king on home turf

blocks.label: ⚽ CL second legs — four ties, all still breathing
items: Tue 21:00 — Atlético Madrid vs Barcelona (Barça 2-0 down at the Metropolitano — miracle required)
Tue 21:00 — Liverpool vs PSG (Anfield roar needed, Liverpool trail 0-2)
Wed 21:00 — Arsenal vs Sporting CP (Arsenal hold slim 1-0 lead — one mistake flips it)
Wed 21:00 — Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid (Bayern lead 2-1, nothing is safe in this fixture)
